title: codereview: input driver skeleton missing
description: After adding Kconfig/CMakeLists and binding, the C driver implementation lilygo_tdeck_keyboard.c is still missing. Must follow Zephyr input patterns exactly (no comments, use existing patterns from gpio_keys or similar I2C input drivers). Must handle I2C at 0x55 without crashing on Renode stub. P1 until implemented. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zonh.3
